titleStmt.title: SII 25.102: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 102. (A.R. No. 102 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
This inscription may be assigned to the 12-13th century on grounds of palaeography. The details of the record viz., Ṛishabha, 20th day are not sufficient for verification.

It records the allotment of dēvadāṉa lands of the deity by the mūlaparishai of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśinga-vaḷanāḍu after receiving 50 śōḻiyanaṟ-paḻaṅ-kāśu deposited in the temple treasury by Taḷiyilā[ḷi] Nakka[ṉ Pāṇḍiyakkō]li, a resident of Niyamam in Tēṉāṟṟuppōkku for maintaining a perpetual lamp to the deity Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār. It also refers to the gift of five tulā (material not known ?) for a standing lamp, probably in the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī tribhuvanacakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5vatu ṛṣabhanā
yiṟṟu 3 10tiyati nāḷ keraḷaciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirupputtūr mulapariṣaiyo
m ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻa viṇṇakarāḻvār tiruvācalil kūṭiyirukka teṉāṟṟu pokku ni
ya mattu Irukkuntaḷiyilāḷi nakkaṉpāṇṭi tiruttaḷi yāṇṭa nāyanāṟku vaitta tiru
nontāviḷakku 1 Oṉṟukku śrī paṇṭārattoṭukkiṉa coḻiya naṟpaḻaṅkācu 5 10 Ikkācu Aympatu
m Ināyaṉār tevatānam vaṭavūr viḷākattu cikaṇṭavayakkalum vaṭakkiṟkiṇaṟumin lattālit tiru—
nontā viḷakkuc cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom mulapariṣaiyo
m Itu śrīmāheśvara rakṣai . meṟpaṭiyāḷ Ayntu lāt tāliṭṭa tarātirunilaiviḷakku Oṉṟu
Digital edition of SII 25.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
